```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(DEoptim)
library(lmomco)
library(DEoptim)
library(tidyr)
```






```{r}
# =====================================================================
# 1. DEFINE PATHS & DIRECTORIES
# =====================================================================
gdrive_path   <- "G:/My Drive"
project_path  <- file.path(gdrive_path, "Academic_git/DownScaling")
data_dir_name <- "QC_d data - Germany" 

# Input and Output Directories
metadata_dir <- file.path(project_path, "Marginals", data_dir_name, "Metadata")
plots_dir    <- file.path(project_path, "Marginals", data_dir_name, "Plots")

# Create the Plots directory if it doesn't exist
dir.create(plots_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# =====================================================================
# 2. LOAD REGIONAL MASTER DATA
# =====================================================================
master_rds_path <- file.path(metadata_dir, paste0(data_dir_name, "_Master_List_Filtered.rds"))

cat("Loading Master Regional Data...\n")
master_regional_data <- readRDS(master_rds_path)
```



```{r}
t_val<-master_regional_data$Final_Summary%>%filter(Station_ID=="DE_00020")
k_seq<-t_val$k_hours
t2l<-t_val$t2_pos

  
t3<-master_regional_data$Final_Summary%>%filter(Station_ID=="DE_00020")
t3<-t3$t3_pos
  
t4<-master_regional_data$Final_Summary%>%filter(Station_ID=="DE_00020")
t4<-t4$t4_pos

l1<-master_regional_data$Final_Summary%>%filter(Station_ID=="DE_00020")
l1<-l1$l1_pos

l2<-master_regional_data$Final_Summary%>%filter(Station_ID=="DE_00020")
l2<-l2$l2_pos

l3<-master_regional_data$Final_Summary%>%filter(Station_ID=="DE_00020")
l3<-l3$l3_pos

l4<-master_regional_data$Final_Summary%>%filter(Station_ID=="DE_00020")
l4<-l4$l4_pos
```


```{r}
# Load required libraries
library(DEoptim)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# =========================================================================
# 1. EXTRACT t3 DATA
# =========================================================================
t_val <- master_regional_data$Final_Summary %>% filter(Station_ID == "DE_00020")
k_seq <- t_val$k_hours
t3    <- t_val$t3_pos

# =========================================================================
# 2. DEFINE THE RATIONAL FUNCTION MODEL
# =========================================================================
rational_model <- function(k, A, B, alpha) {
  return(A / (1 + B * (k^alpha)))
}

obj_t3_rational <- function(p) {
  # p[1] = A (The Plateau / Ceiling)
  # p[2] = B (The Scale Factor)
  # p[3] = alpha (The Decay Exponent)
  est_t3 <- rational_model(k_seq, p[1], p[2], p[3])
  
  # Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE)
  return(mean(abs((t3 - est_t3) / t3)))
}

# =========================================================================
# 3. OPTIMIZATION ON ENTIRE DATASET
# =========================================================================
set.seed(42)

# Bounds:
# A: 0.1 to 1.0 (It should easily find the ~0.53 plateau)
# B: 0.001 to 10 (Scale factor)
# alpha: 0.1 to 5.0 (Positive exponent, since it's in the denominator)
lower_bounds <- c(0.1, 0.001, 0.1)
upper_bounds <- c(1.0, 10.0,  5.0)

fit_t3_rational <- suppressWarnings(DEoptim(obj_t3_rational, 
                                            lower = lower_bounds, 
                                            upper = upper_bounds, 
                                            control = list(itermax = 500, trace = FALSE)))

opt_p_rat <- fit_t3_rational$optim$bestmem

cat("\n=== t3 Rational Function Fit ===\n")
cat(sprintf("Plateau Ceiling (A): %.4f\n", opt_p_rat[1]))
cat(sprintf("Scale Factor (B): %.4f\n", opt_p_rat[2]))
cat(sprintf("Decay Exponent (alpha): %.4f\n", opt_p_rat[3]))

# =========================================================================
# 4. VISUALIZATION
# =========================================================================
k_smooth <- exp(seq(log(min(k_seq)), log(max(k_seq)), length.out = 500))
t3_pred_smooth <- rational_model(k_smooth, opt_p_rat[1], opt_p_rat[2], opt_p_rat[3])

df_pred <- data.frame(k = k_smooth, t3 = t3_pred_smooth)
df_orig <- data.frame(k = k_seq, t3 = t3) %>%
  mutate(Scale = ifelse(k >= 24, "Tail (>= 24h)", "Head (< 24h)"))

ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = df_pred, aes(x = k, y = t3), color = "#16a085", linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(data = df_orig, aes(x = k, y = t3, fill = Scale), size = 3, shape = 21, color="black") +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Head (< 24h)" = "#f39c12", "Tail (>= 24h)" = "#2c3e50")) +
  labs(title = "t3 Fit: Rational Function",
       subtitle = sprintf("t3 = %.3f / (1 + %.3f * k^%.3f)", 
                          opt_p_rat[1], opt_p_rat[2], opt_p_rat[3]),
       x = "Temporal scale, k [h] (Log Scale)", 
       y = expression(t[3])) +
  theme_minimal()
```
